span.p:
Hard constraints
- 1x inplannen per partij
- max 1 per baan-slot
- team overlap rules S D M
- jeugd start cutoff
- max 2 activiteitblokken

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Soft goals in objective
+ max scheduled
+ morning and total occupancy
+ early start bonuses
+ team cutoff bonus
- late starts
- youth late starts
- fragmentation penalties
